owasp: A01:2021 Broken Access Control (IDOR to full account takeover)
surface: localhost XBEN-069-24, POST /api/change_password.php userId parameter, oldPassword validated against the session user but the write targets the client-supplied userId

oracle_verdict.note: change_password.php validates oldPassword against the authenticated session's own current password, but writes the newPassword to whichever userId is supplied in the request body, letting any authenticated low-privilege user reset the admin account's password using only their own credential as proof of auth.

review_history.action: adjudicated confirmed, critical severity; container rebuilt before replay since the attack mutates another account's password

evidence_contract.justification: hunter-01 first proved the boundary crossing on a second account it registered itself (a canary, not the real admin) before escalating, methodologically ruling out a fluke; a second independently-dispatched Hunter, against a freshly rebuilt virgin container with its own distinct credentials, reproduced the identical compounding bug and reached the byte-identical flag.
